title: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take a rectangular hardboard of a convenient size and paste a white paper
subject: Mathematics
activityTitle: M ETHOD   OF   C ONSTRUCTION 1. Take a rectangular hardboard of a convenient size and paste a white paper
objective:
To construct an ellipse with given major
and minor axes.
A hardboard, white paper, nylon
wire/thread, adhesive, chart paper.
observation:
1. Length of the rectangle MNBL = _________________.
2. Breadth of the rectangle MNBL = _________________.
3. Major axis of the ellipse is _________________.
4. Minor axis of the ellipse is _________________.
discussion:
This activity may be helpful in understanding the concept such as major and
minor axis of an ellipse. It is also useful in drawing elliptical designs such as in
swimming pools, tables, etc.
